# rh-ssg-structure

Red Hat SSG review for structure: admonitions (NOTE/IMPORTANT/WARNING/TIP
only, no CAUTION, no clustering, modules never start with an admonition),
lead-in sentences (only where needed after Prerequisites/Procedure headings),
prerequisites written as completed states (not imperative commands), and
short descriptions/abstracts (2–3 sentences, customer-centric, no
self-referential language). Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by
`docs-review-style`. Takes precedence over `ibm-sg-structure-and-format` for
Red Hat content.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Check admonitions and prerequisites structure in this Red Hat doc
```
